_README: Prototype KPI dataset for the Reach Riverside logic model — TIME-SERIES format. Keyed by EXACT logic-model row label (Outputs column OR one of the three Outcomes columns). Each indicator carries a 'series' (year -> value) instead of baseline/current/target; values may be a number or a string like 'TBD'. 'direction' = 'up' (higher better), 'down' (lower better), or 'neutral' (volume metric, no good/bad judgment — shown grey). 'target' optional (null = none), shown as reference only. Status color is derived from the year-over-year trend. NOTE ON OUTPUTS vs OUTCOMES: the 2023–2025 WRK Group reports are overwhelmingly OUTPUT (activity) counts, so those are mapped to the Outputs column; the Outcomes columns hold only genuine outcome rates here, which is why most outcome rows are intentionally still 'No KPI yet' (a real measurement gap). VALUES ARE REAL FIGURES from the 2023–2025 reports; row mapping is illustrative for this prototype.

Financial assistance provided.definition: Number of individuals who received utility assistance.

Financial assistance provided.indicator: Individuals who received mortgage or rental assistance
Financial assistance provided.definition: Number of individuals who received mortgage or rental assistance.

Ongoing case management services receive.indicator: Individuals who received ongoing case management services
Ongoing case management services receive.definition: Individuals who received ongoing case management services (enrolled in program).

Parent education/engagement events held.definition: Number of parent education/engagement events held.

Students enrolled.definition: Number of children ages 1–5 enrolled in the Early Learning Academy. Volume metric — capacity-limited, no inherent good/bad direction.

Youth served.definition: Number of school-aged youth enrolled in KCC programming. Volume metric.

Individuals attending health workshops.definition: Number of individuals who attended health workshops.

Individuals accessing healthcare service.indicator: Individuals who accessed primary healthcare services
Individuals accessing healthcare service.definition: Number of individuals who accessed primary healthcare services.

Individuals accessing mental health serv.indicator: Individuals who accessed behavioral/mental health services
Individuals accessing mental health serv.definition: Number of individuals who accessed behavioral/mental health services.

Enrollment in and completion of job skil.indicator: Individuals enrolled in a job skills training program
Enrollment in and completion of job skil.definition: Number of individuals enrolled in a job skills training program.

Enrollment in and completion of job skil.indicator: Individuals who completed a job skills training program
Enrollment in and completion of job skil.definition: Number of individuals who completed a job skills training program.

Externships and job placements.definition: Number of individuals who obtained employment.

Individuals enrolled in entrepreneurial.definition: Individuals enrolled in entrepreneurial programs (e.g. Launcher, WEALTH Garage). No WRK client participated in a Launcher cohort in 2025.

Seniors attending the Senior Center.definition: Number of seniors who attended the Senior Center.

Partnership agreements signed or renewed.definition: Number of partner agreements signed or renewed.

Widened network of partner organizations.definition: Number of partner organizations. NOTE: the 2023 figure (167) appears to use a different counting basis than 2024–2025 (27) — likely a definitional change, not a real decline. Marked neutral pending reconciliation.

Individuals completing financial assessm.indicator: Individuals who completed a financial assessment
Individuals completing financial assessm.definition: Individuals who completed a financial assessment (e.g. financial capability score, credit analysis).

Individuals completing financial educati.indicator: Individuals who completed a financial education class
Individuals completing financial educati.definition: Individuals who completed a financial education class, including tax-preparation assistance.

Foreclosures/evictions prevented.definition: Number of foreclosures and evictions that were prevented for families.

Up-to-date rental and utility payments.indicator: Individuals past due on rent/utilities now current
Up-to-date rental and utility payments.definition: Number of individuals who were past due in rent/utilities who are now current.

Increased promotion of youth to the next.indicator: School-aged youth promoted to the next grade
Increased promotion of youth to the next.definition: Share of enrolled school-aged youth (ages 5–12) promoted to the next grade.

Increased kindergarten readiness.definition: Share of the graduating Early Learning Academy class assessed as kindergarten-ready (4th consecutive year at 100%).
